summary: Comprehensive testing of Auto-Push feature added to Shri Maruti Logistics dashboard. All new features tested and working: Auto-Push settings tab with enable/disable toggle, delivery mode selector, pickup address configuration, webhook status card showing 'orders/paid webhook active', and push failures section. All 6 tabs render correctly. Backend APIs for auto-push settings, webhooks, and push-failures working correctly. All existing features passed regression tests.
critical_code_review_comments: LogisticsDashboard.jsx: AutoPushSettings component well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes
logistics.py: /auto-push/settings GET and POST endpoints working correctly with MongoDB persistence
logistics.py: /webhooks endpoint correctly lists registered Shopify webhooks
logistics.py: /push-failures endpoint returns failure logs for debugging
shopify_webhooks.py: auto_push_to_innofulfill background task properly checks settings before pushing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing settings and webhook registration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Push feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) Auto-Push tab loads with settings form showing toggle (currently ON), delivery mode (Surface), and pickup address fields. 2) Toggle switch works - clicking toggles between ON/OFF states. 3) Save Settings button works - shows toast 'Auto-push enabled and saved'. 4) Webhook status card shows 'orders/paid webhook active' with URL https://catalog-sync-11.preview.emergentagent.com/api/shopify/webhook/orders/paid. 5) Re-register button present. 6) Push failures section shows 'No failures recorded'. 7) All 6 tabs render correctly: Rates, Bulk Ship, Book, Shipments, Track, Auto-Push. 8) Regression tests pass: Rate Calculator (Surface ₹90, Air ₹130), Bulk Ship (423 orders), Shipments (TNVC-TEST-002).

auto_push_tab_loads.details: Auto-Push tab loads with settings form, toggle, delivery mode selector, pickup address fields

auto_push_toggle.details: Toggle switch works - clicking toggles between ON/OFF states correctly

auto_push_save_settings.details: Save Settings button works - shows toast 'Auto-push enabled and saved'

webhook_status_card.details: Shows 'orders/paid webhook active' with webhook URL, Re-register button present

all_6_tabs_render.details: Rates, Bulk Ship, Book, Shipments, Track, Auto-Push tabs all render correctly

get_auto_push_settings_api.details: GET /api/logistics/auto-push/settings returns settings with enabled, delivery_type, pickup fields

list_webhooks_api.details: GET /api/logistics/webhooks returns list of registered webhooks including orders/paid

rate_calculator_regression.details: Rate Calculator still works - Surface (₹90) and Air (₹130) rates display correctly

bulk_ship_regression.details: Bulk Ship tab loads 423 orders ready for shipping

shipments_regression.details: Shipments tab lists existing booking TNVC-TEST-002 with AWB TNVC0000000004

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real Innofulfill and Shopify API calls - no mocking. Did NOT test register-webhook endpoint to avoid creating duplicates as per instructions.

note_on_webhook_testing: As per agent_to_agent_context_note, did NOT call the register-webhook endpoint again as webhook is already registered (ID: 2164300185766). Only verified GET endpoints and settings POST.
